# Borellion SDK

Borellion lets developers monetize 3D and WebXR experiences with in-scene banner ads. Banners are rendered as textured meshes inside the 3D scene — not as HTML overlays.

Docs: https://www.borellion.com/docs/guides/developers/integrate
Dashboard: https://app.borellion.com
Support: elijah@borellion.com

## Key Concepts

- **Ad Unit ID**: A UUID identifying the ad placement. Created in the Borellion Dashboard. Use `YOUR_AD_UNIT_ID` as a placeholder until the developer provides the real value.
- **Format**: The aspect ratio of the banner. Options: `billboard` (970×250), `medium-rectangle` (300×250), `mobile-phone-interstitial` (750×1334).
- **Debug mode**: Append `?debug=true` to the URL to load sample ads locally. Real ads only serve in production.
- **Beacon**: Analytics for the ad unit (impressions and clicks). Enabled by default. Set `beacon: false` to opt out.
- **Prebid**: Programmatic demand via Prebid/Aditude. Enabled by default. Set `prebid: false` to fetch ads directly from Borellion's ad server.

## Packages

| Framework | Package | Install |
|-----------|---------|---------|
| A-Frame | `@borellion/aframe-sdk` | `npm i @borellion/aframe-sdk` |
| Babylon.js | `@borellion/babylonjs-sdk` | `npm i @borellion/babylonjs-sdk` |
| PlayCanvas | `@borellion/playcanvas-sdk` | `npm i @borellion/playcanvas-sdk` |
| React Three Fiber | `@borellion/r3f-sdk` | `npm i @borellion/r3f-sdk` |
| Three.js | `@borellion/threejs-sdk` | `npm i @borellion/threejs-sdk` |
| Web Components | `@borellion/web-sdk` | `npm i @borellion/web-sdk` |
| Wonderland Engine | `@borellion/wonderland-sdk` | `npm i @borellion/wonderland-sdk` |
| Unity | `com.borellion.unity-sdk` | UPM git URL |

CDN base: `https://cdn.borellion.com/sdk/`

---

## A-Frame

```sh
npm install @borellion/aframe-sdk
```

```html
<!-- CDN -->
<script src="https://cdn.borellion.com/sdk/borellion-aframe-sdk.js"></script>

<!-- In <a-scene> -->
<a-entity
  borellion="adUnit: YOUR_AD_UNIT_ID; format: medium-rectangle;"
  position="0 2 0">
</a-entity>
```

Component attributes: `adUnit` (string, required), `format` (string, required), `height` (float, default 1), `beacon` (bool, default true), `prebid` (bool, default true).

---

## Babylon.js

```sh
npm install @borellion/babylonjs-sdk
```

```js
import Borellion from '@borellion/babylonjs-sdk';

// new Borellion(adUnit, format, style, height, scene, xrHelper?, beacon?, prebid?)
const banner = new Borellion('YOUR_AD_UNIT_ID', 'medium-rectangle', 'standard', 3, scene);
```

Parameters: `adUnit` (string), `format` (string), `style` ('standard'|'minimal'|'transparent'), `height` (number), `scene` (BABYLON.Scene), `webXRExperienceHelper` (optional), `beacon` (bool, default true), `prebid` (bool, default true).

---

## PlayCanvas

```sh
npm install @borellion/playcanvas-sdk
```

```js
import Borellion from '@borellion/playcanvas-sdk';

const banner = new pc.Entity();
banner.addComponent('script');
banner.script.create('borellion');
banner.script['borellion'].adUnitId = 'YOUR_AD_UNIT_ID';
banner.script['borellion'].format = 1; // 1=Medium Rectangle, 2=Billboard, 3=Mobile Phone Interstitial
banner.script['borellion'].cameraEntity = camera;
app.root.addChild(banner);
```

Editor variant CDN: `https://cdn.borellion.com/sdk/borellion-playcanvas-sdk-editor.js`

Properties: `adUnitId` (string, required), `format` (enum: 1/2/3), `cameraEntity` (Entity, required), `prebid` (bool, default true).

---

## React Three Fiber

```sh
npm install @borellion/r3f-sdk
```

```jsx
import { Borellion } from '@borellion/r3f-sdk';
// For WebXR: import { BorellionXR } from '@borellion/r3f-sdk/xr';

<Borellion
  adUnit="YOUR_AD_UNIT_ID"
  format="medium-rectangle"
  position={[0, 2, -3]}
/>
```

Props: `adUnit` (string, required), `format` (string, required), `position` (array, default [0,0,0]), `height` (number, default 1), `beacon` (bool, default true), `prebid` (bool, default true).

---

## Three.js

```sh
npm install @borellion/threejs-sdk
```

```js
import Borellion from '@borellion/threejs-sdk';

// new Borellion(adUnit, format, style, height, renderer?, beacon?, prebid?)
const banner = new Borellion('YOUR_AD_UNIT_ID', 'medium-rectangle', 'standard', 3);
scene.add(banner);
```

Parameters: `adUnit` (string), `format` (string), `style` ('standard'|'minimal'|'transparent'), `height` (number), `renderer` (WebGLRenderer, optional — required for WebXR), `beacon` (bool, default true), `prebid` (bool, default true).

---

## Web Components

```sh
npm install @borellion/web-sdk
```

```html
<script src="https://cdn.borellion.com/sdk/borellion-web-sdk.js"></script>

<borellion-ad
  ad-unit="YOUR_AD_UNIT_ID"
  format="medium-rectangle"
  width="300px">
</borellion-ad>
```

Attributes: `ad-unit` (string, required), `format` (string, required), `width` (CSS string, optional).

---

## Wonderland Engine

```sh
npm install @borellion/wonderland-sdk
```

```js
import { Borellion } from '@borellion/wonderland-sdk';

// Register before engine starts loading the scene
engine.registerComponent(Borellion);

// Add to a mesh object programmatically
const bannerObject = engine.scene.addObject();
bannerObject.addComponent(Borellion, {
  adUnit: 'YOUR_AD_UNIT_ID',
  format: 5, // 5=medium-rectangle
});
// Or add the 'borellion' component in the Wonderland Editor UI
```

Format enum: 0=tall, 1=wide, 2=square, 3=mobile-phone-interstitial, 4=billboard, 5=medium-rectangle.

The object must have a `mesh` component. `cursor-target` and `collision` are created automatically if absent. A cursor must be set up in the scene for click interactions.

Properties: `adUnit` (string), `format` (enum, default square), `style` ('standard'|'minimal'|'transparent', default transparent), `scaleToRatio` (bool, default true), `textureProperty` (string, default 'auto'), `beacon` (bool, default true), `prebid` (bool, default true), `customDefaultImage` (string), `customDefaultCtaUrl` (string), `modalTrigger` (string), `modalBackground` (bool, default false), `modalDelay` (float, default 0).

---

## Unity

Install via Unity Package Manager using the git URL: `https://github.com/borellion/sdk`

1. Add the **BorellionSDK** prefab to the scene hierarchy
2. Add the **Banner** prefab to the scene
3. Set **Ad Unit ID** and **Format** in the Inspector
4. **Beacon Enabled** (default true) — analytics
5. **Prebid Enabled** (default true) — programmatic demand

---

## Common Mistakes

- Do not use `@zestyxyz/` package names — these are the old names. All packages are now under `@borellion/`.
- The A-Frame component attribute is `borellion`, not `borellion-banner` or `zesty-banner`.
- The PlayCanvas script name is `'borellion'`, not `'borellion-banner'`.
- The Wonderland component TypeName is `'borellion'`.
- `format` values differ between frameworks: A-Frame/Three.js/Babylon/R3F use string names; PlayCanvas uses integers 1/2/3; Wonderland uses integers 0–5.
- For WebXR in Three.js, pass the `WebGLRenderer` as the fifth argument. For Babylon.js, pass the `WebXRExperienceHelper` as the sixth argument.
